title: lobivia backebergii subsp. zecheri
intro: Lobivia backebergii subsp. zecheri is a rare cactus species that belongs to the Lobivia genus, known for its unique and vibrant flowers. The plant contains various alkaloids and glycosides with known medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Lobivia backebergii subsp. zecheri is believed to provide several health benefits, such as improving digestion and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and grinding the cactus pads, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
